scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:runtime && npm run build:css && npm run build:site
scripts.build:vite: npm run build:tools && npm run build:runtime && node scripts/css-build.mjs && vite build
scripts.check: npm run build:tools && npm run build:runtime && node scripts/css-build.mjs && node scripts/check-site.mjs && node scripts/check-generated.mjs
scripts.check:css: npm run build:tools && node scripts/css-build.mjs && node scripts/css-contracts.mjs && node scripts/css-build.mjs --check && node scripts/check-generated.mjs
scripts.check:generated: npm run build:tools && npm run build:runtime && node scripts/css-build.mjs && node scripts/check-generated.mjs
scripts.dev: npm run build:tools && npm run build:runtime && node scripts/css-build.mjs && vite
scripts.dev:host: npm run build:tools && npm run build:runtime && node scripts/css-build.mjs && vite --host 0.0.0.0
scripts.dev:open: npm run build:tools && npm run build:runtime && node scripts/css-build.mjs && vite --open
scripts.test:engagement: npm run build:tools && npm run build:runtime && node --test scripts/tests/engagement-features.test.mjs
